title: DrumBurp: English translation of PyQt5 migration report
original_text: Let me read the Spanish report first: Done. migration_report_pyqt5.md is a complete, faithful English translation of the Spanish report. Every section, checkbox, code block, table, and technical note has been translated — nothing was omitted or summarised. The two files now sit side by side: - migration_report_pyqt5_ES.md — Spanish original - migration_report_pyqt5.md — English translation
expected_subject: docs(i18n): add English translation of PyQt5 migration report
expected_body_lines: - Preserve all technical details, code blocks, and checklists
- Provide side-by-side Spanish and English documentation
- Ensure global accessibility for project maintainers
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(i18n): add English translation of PyQt5 migration report"
